name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Reworked the opening panel flow into a more project-first layout.
- Added a compact in-panel action menu instead of scattering utility buttons in the main surface.
- Replaced native CEP/browser confirmation prompts with in-panel confirmation and notice modals for normal product flows.
- Prepared the extension shell for desktop-driven feature gating, including workspace-aware comments visibility.
- Refined the `Home` ready state around the active project card:
- project name and connection state first
- direct `Open proxies` action
- sentence-style proxy availability summary instead of boxed counters
- inline proxy creation CTA when files can be created
- Moved `Open Logs`, `Explore Folder`, and `Forget Path` into the compact header menu.
- Replaced product-facing native dialogs with in-panel modals for:
- forgetting the cache path
- clearing the local cache
- missing cache-location / no-local-proxy / safety-stop notices
- Added workspace-aware comments gating support in the extension shell so the `Comments` tab can be hidden when the desktop bridge marks it unavailable.
- Extension version bumped to `1.8.0`.
- Update `extensions/adobe-premiere/latest.json` in `videovault-release-updates` after packaging the new macOS and Windows installers.
- Release tag should follow:
- `premiere-extension-v1.8.0`
